jobs.title: Product Manager Sr
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's 4.10 years of product management experience, including strong analytics, reliability, platform management, and governance, aligns exceptionally well with a Senior Product Manager role at a financial institution like PNC, complemented by relevant MBA coursework.

jobs.title: Credit Product Manager
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's extensive product management experience, strong analytical and technical skills, and relevant MBA coursework in financial systems make them a highly suitable candidate for a Credit Product Manager role, despite the domain shift from manufacturing/EdTech to finance.

jobs.title: Product Manager II - Investment Office Product Management
jobs.match_reason: The candidate's 4-5 years of product management experience, strong analytical and platform reliability background, and technical skills align well with a Product Manager II role, but direct experience in investment office products is not evident, despite relevant MBA coursework.
